revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-100

Emission of energy (e.g. radiation from an emitter) or transport of energy associated with the phenomena of electromagnetic waves or particles.

The propagated energy itself.

{{IALAFooter}}
